title: Philips Oxygen Concentrator EVERFLO
description: Light weight and Easy to Transport Oxygen Purity Indicator 3 Years Warranty Provides a continuous flow Budget-friendly Low maintenance for reduced service cost
longDescription:
The EverFlo Oxygen Concentrator is a stationary home medical device designed to provide a continuous flow of medical-grade oxygen (0.5–5 liters per minute) for individuals with chronic respiratory conditions like COPD, asthma, or hypoxemia. It draws in room air, filters it, then uses zeolite-based sieves (Pressure Swing Adsorption) to separate nitrogen and deliver around 93 % ±3% oxygen content.


Key Highlights

  • Ultra-lightweight & compact
  • Weighs about 14 kg (31 lbs) one of the lightest stationary units available making it easier to transport and store.
  • Quiet & energy-efficient
  • Runs at approximately 45 dB, akin to a quiet conversation or soft appliance hum.
  • Consumes around 350 watts, producing less heat and lowering running costs.
  • Low maintenance
  • Requires filter replacement only every two years by a provider no frequent user maintenance needed.
  • Safe & user‑friendly design
  • Compact and less medical-looking, it fits comfortably into home settings.
  • Features like a recessed flow meter minimize accidental bumps or misalignment.
  • Equipped with a Humidifier Bottle Platform and durable metal cannula built for flexibility and durability.
  • Optional Oxygen Purity Indicator (OPI) provides real-time monitoring and alarms if oxygen drops below safe thresholds (e.g., <82 % or <70 %).
  • Built for patient safety & convenience
  • Produces high-purity oxygen consistently, with simplified setup and operation.
inTheBox: Supplied with Bubble Bottle ,Connector and Cannula 1 N/E
